SEARCH
Package org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer

Interface DdoModel<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the state type
All Superinterfaces:
Model<T>
public interface DdoModel<T> extends Model<T>
Defines the interface for an unlayered Dynamic Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO) model.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default NoLayerDominanceChecker<T>
    dominance()
    Returns a dominance checker to prune inferior states during compilation.
    default boolean
    exportDot()
    Indicates whether the generated decision diagram should be exported to a DOT file (Graphviz format).
    default StateRanking<T>
    ranking()
    Returns the ranking function used to order states when width must be reduced.
    Relaxation<T>
    relaxation()
    Returns the relaxation of the model used to merge states in the decision diagram.
    default ReductionStrategy<T>
    relaxStrategy()
    Strategy to select which nodes should be merged together on a relaxed DD.
    default ReductionStrategy<T>
    restrictStrategy()
    Strategy to select which nodes should be dropped on a restricted DD.
    default boolean
    useCache()
    Indicates whether caching should be used during the diagram construction.
    default WidthHeuristic<T>
    widthHeuristic()
    Returns the width heuristic controlling the maximum number of states in the frontier.

    Methods inherited from interface org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer.Model

    debugMode, lowerBound, problem, upperBound, verbosityLevel

  • Method Details

    • relaxation

      Relaxation<T> relaxation()
      Returns the relaxation of the model used to merge states in the decision diagram.
      Returns:
      the Relaxation object associated with this model

    • ranking

      default StateRanking<T> ranking()
      Returns the ranking function used to order states when width must be reduced. Higher priority states are kept exact, lower priority states are dropped or merged.
      Returns:
      a StateRanking comparator between states

    • widthHeuristic

      default WidthHeuristic<T> widthHeuristic()
      Returns the width heuristic controlling the maximum number of states in the frontier.
      Returns:
      a WidthHeuristic instance controlling diagram width

    • relaxStrategy

      default ReductionStrategy<T> relaxStrategy()
      Strategy to select which nodes should be merged together on a relaxed DD.

    • restrictStrategy

      default ReductionStrategy<T> restrictStrategy()
      Strategy to select which nodes should be dropped on a restricted DD.

    • useCache

      default boolean useCache()
      Indicates whether caching should be used during the diagram construction.
      Returns:
      true if caching is enabled, false otherwise

    • dominance

      default NoLayerDominanceChecker<T> dominance()
      Returns a dominance checker to prune inferior states during compilation.
      Specified by:
      dominance in interface Model<T>
      Returns:
      a NoLayerDominanceChecker instance

    • exportDot

      default boolean exportDot()
      Indicates whether the generated decision diagram should be exported to a DOT file (Graphviz format).
      Returns:
      true if DOT export is enabled, false otherwise
